data.raceComments: {"comment":"5. SHE'S WANTED scored her maiden success two back then hit the frame last time when third and beaten 0.8 lengths at this track over 380m (22.35). Back to track where she won her maiden. Good run latest and can go on with it. 1. HARA'S REX was game in defeat off the inside draw last start, finishing second and beaten 0.8 lengths (22.35) behind Tommy's Whisky at this track. Expecting another good run. 2. TOBIAS IVY doesn't have the best strike-rate. Hit the board with a minor placing last time when third (22.30) at this track. Has never been out of the placings from three starts out of this box. Can measure up. 7. MONTEBELLO gets a chance to redeem an unplaced effort here last start.","runners":[5,1,2,7],"exclusive":false}
